title: Tech+
description: Modpack that mainly focus on technology mods
body:
# Tech+
>Technology Modpack with over 180 mods where the main goal is building a factory. Also a little bit of exploring.

### Installation ⚙️
> - For now only supported launcher is [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)
> - You can download Modpack from Web Browser or find it in Browse section in Modrinth App
> - After everything is installed you will see Tech+ in your Modrinth Library
> - Make sure you allocated al least 4GB of RAM in Modrinth App Settings
> - NOTE - After First Launch you will get info about missing FTB Mods. You have to download it manually and drop it in /mods folder

### Bug Reports ❗
>Tech+ is in early stage of development. If you find any bugs, crashes etc. please make report on [Discord](https://discord.gg/uaX8D5jQp2)
